perturbation.original_text: The term of this Agreement is for a period of five (5) years (the "Term") commencing on the Effective Date and, unless terminated earlier in accordance with the termination provisions of this Agreement, ending on January 31, 2025.
perturbation.changed_text: The term of this Agreement is for a period of five (5) years (the "Term") commencing on the Effective Date and, unless terminated earlier in accordance with the termination provisions of this Agreement, ending on January 31, 2025. However, the term can be extended indefinitely at the sole discretion of the Company, with no prior notice to the Consultant.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'However, the term can be extended indefinitely at the sole discretion of the Company, with no prior notice to the Consultant.' to Section 4.2, it contradicts the original fixed end date of January 31, 2025. This creates uncertainty about the actual duration of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The term of this Agreement is for a period of five (5) years (the "Term") commencing on the Effective Date and, unless terminated earlier in accordance with the termination provisions of this Agreement, ending on January 31, 2025. However, the term can be extended indefinitely at the sole discretion of the Company, with no prior notice to the Consultant.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a contradiction by adding a clause that allows the Company to extend the term indefinitely, which directly conflicts with the original, fixed end date of January 31, 2025. The contradicted text defines the term as ending on a specific date, while the changed text allows for an indefinite extension, creating uncertainty and a direct contradiction regarding the agreement's duration as laid out in the explanation. The contradiction falls under the Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction definition, as the clause is placed in a location with conflicting implications.

perturbation.original_text: The Consultant shall provide management and financial consulting services, including the supervision of the senior management, all staff, and all field personnel of the Company, whether employees or consultants, strategic planning and property acquisitions, strategic financial planning and annual budget reviews, as well as the implementation and monitoring of the Company's compliance with continuous reporting requirements, internal controls over accounting systems and financial reporting to the Company.
perturbation.changed_text: The Consultant shall provide management and financial consulting services, including the supervision of the senior management, all staff, and all field personnel of the Company, whether employees or consultants, strategic planning and property acquisitions, strategic financial planning and annual budget reviews, as well as the implementation and monitoring of the Company's compliance with continuous reporting requirements, internal controls over accounting systems and financial reporting to the Company. The consultant is not allowed to manage or supervise the Company in any way.
perturbation.explanation: The addition of 'The consultant is not allowed to manage or supervise the Company in any way.' to Schedule A directly contradicts the initial statement that the Consultant provides 'the supervision of the senior management, all staff, and all field personnel of the Company'. This creates confusion about the scope of the Consultant's duties.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Consultant shall provide management and financial consulting services, including the supervision of the senior management, all staff, and all field personnel of the Company, whether employees or consultants, strategic planning and property acquisitions, strategic financial planning and annual budget reviews, as well as the implementation and monitoring of the Company's compliance with continuous reporting requirements, internal controls over accounting systems and financial reporting to the Company. The consultant is not allowed to manage or supervise the Company in any way.
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly states that 'The consultant is not allowed to manage or supervise the Company in any way,' which directly contradicts the original statement that the Consultant provides 'the supervision of the senior management, all staff, and all field personnel of the Company.' This creates a clear and direct conflict within the contract regarding the scope of the Consultant's duties, making enforcement unclear and creating a logical inconsistency. This falls under Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction as it places conflicting implications within the contract.

perturbation.original_text: The Company will pay the Consultant basic remuneration for its services in the sum of $10,000 per month (the "Consulting Fee") commencing on the 1st day of February, 2020, and payable on the last day of each month thereafter up to and including the 31st day of January, 2025, together with any such increments thereto as the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors of the Company may from time to time determine.
perturbation.changed_text: The Company will pay the Consultant basic remuneration for its services in the sum of $10,000 per month (the "Consulting Fee") commencing on the 1st day of February, 2020, and payable on the last day of each month thereafter up to and including the 31st day of January, 2025, together with any such increments thereto as the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors of the Company may from time to time determine. The company reserves the right to modify the compensation at any given time, without prior warning or justification.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'The company reserves the right to modify the compensation at any given time, without prior warning or justification.' to Section 3.1, it creates a direct contradiction to the initial fixed $10,000 monthly fee. It brings ambiguity in the amount that will be paid.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Company will pay the Consultant basic remuneration for its services in the sum of $10,000 per month (the "Consulting Fee") commencing on the 1st day of February, 2020, and payable on the last day of each month thereafter up to and including the 31st day of January, 2025, together with any such increments thereto as the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors of the Company may from time to time determine. The company reserves the right to modify the compensation at any given time, without prior warning or justification.
perturbation.justification: The original text states a fixed payment of $10,000 per month. The changed text adds a clause allowing the company to modify the compensation at any time without warning, directly contradicting the initial fixed amount. This introduces ambiguity and inconsistency, making the initial agreement unenforceable. The changed text directly undermines the certainty of the compensation previously defined in the contract. This aligns with the definition of 'Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction' where a clause is placed in multiple locations with conflicting implications.
